{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323194618BD2F334C8A9DB2B5F90B"}"},"total":474},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7399309083415741208","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"哇哇哇！在番茄少有的与阿蒙有关的书！阿蒙＋规则怪谈真的好好玩！而且里面描写的阿蒙也很符合原著不ooc，看的时候感觉空气里弥漫着阿蒙，而且还有罗塞尔大帝以及疑似亚当的客串，超级超级有意思！主角顾时从最开始的被阿蒙带着过关到现在开始一步步独立解密，书里见证了他作为一个普通人一步步的成长，有时也会陷入生死危机，把顾时的人物形象描写的有血有肉。","text_exts":[{"e":25,"s":21,"text":"规则怪谈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774266378B2B5F90B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227399309083415741208%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227360512285355297854%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722788419,"group_id":"7360512285355297854","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"拨弄时光的指针
遨游命运的影子
欺诈与恶作剧的化身","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9P/x4fBPvJLS0+qHpU4arGAU2VPweAaesynySUCNDm5","gender":0,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1530989425473063","user_name":"用户15309894"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1530989425473063","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7360512285355297854","book_info":{"abstract":"（本小说要素：规则怪谈+推理+直播+国运）
（主角偏向成长类型，由于新人作者导致第一卷塑造不佳，主角观感从第二卷开始直线上升）
（本书不随意发刀，不莫名降智，不输出过激情绪）
那一年，怪谈降临，笼罩世界
那一天，我被选中，成为解密者
那一刻，一枚单片眼镜出现在了我的手中
虚幻的时钟在我的眼前展开
青年的声音笑着对我说
“这很有趣，不是吗？”
『千子湖游步道规则』
『爷爷的葬礼』
『xxx市动物园守则』
我叫顾时，我是时间蠹虫，钻寻怪谈的漏洞
我叫顾时，我看透了规则，这一切皆属真实
我叫顾时，很高兴见到你，准备好听故事了吗？
